title: cleome ehrenbergiana
intro: Cleome ehrenbergiana, also known as Spider Flower or Spider Cleome, is a species of flowering plant in the Cleome genus. This plant is traditionally used in medicine due to its antispasmodic, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic properties, which can help in treating various health issues. The medicinal properties of Cleome ehrenbergiana can provide relief from fever, rheumatism, and respiratory problems, and it has been used to treat skin conditions, wounds, and gastrointestinal disorders. Herbal preparations of Cleome ehrenbergiana can be consumed as teas, tinctures, or infusions, and are often used in traditional medicine to promote overall health and well-being.
